info.title: EOS Ads + GA4 Service
info.description: Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta Ads, and GA4 BigQuery. Protected routes need header X-API-Key (Railway API_KEY). GET /health is public.

get.summary: Health check
List accessible Google Ads accounts

post.summary: Run GAQL search for one account

customer_id.description: Google Ads customer ID, digits only

post.summary: Run GAQL search across multiple accounts
List YouTube video assets with watch, embed, and thumbnail URLs
post.description: Returns YouTube video IDs and URLs from Google Ads video assets (not parsed from ad names). Merges ad_group_ad_asset_view (Demand Gen, Performance Max video, etc.), classic VIDEO ads, and optional account-level YOUTUBE_VIDEO assets. Each row includes youtube_thumbnail_url (img.youtube.com).

include_account_assets.description: Also include YOUTUBE_VIDEO rows from the asset table (account inventory).

source.description: Where the video link was discovered in Google Ads.

youtube_thumbnail_url.description: YouTube thumbnail image URL (hqdefault.jpg). Use for previews in dashboards.

post.summary: Sync Google Ads daily metrics to Postgres (metrics_daily)
post.description: Pulls day-by-day spend/clicks/impressions/conversions from Google Ads GAQL into metrics_daily. Requires DATABASE_URL and Google Ads credentials.

customer_id.description: Google Ads customer ID, digits only

post.summary: Sync GA4 daily metrics from BigQuery to Postgres
post.description: Multi-project: use client_key from ga4Clients, or bq_project_id + bq_dataset_id. Default falls back to Railway BQ_PROJECT_ID/BQ_DATASET_ID (Penn). Service account needs BigQuery Data Viewer on each GCP project.

client_key.description: Registry slug: penn, sagefrog, synergistix (from GA4_CLIENTS env)

account_id.description: Optional warehouse key (defaults from dataset id)

get.summary: List GA4 BigQuery clients (multi-project registry)
LinkedIn credential status (no secrets)
Verify LinkedIn OAuth refresh
List LinkedIn ad accounts
LinkedIn Ads performance by campaign (one account)
get.description: Campaign-level metrics only. Each row has entity_level=campaign. LinkedIn has no ad set — do not use this for campaign groups or creatives. For groups use linkedinCampaignGroupsPerformance; for ads/creatives use linkedinCreativesPerformance. Always key rows by id, never by name.

entity_level.description: Roll-up level for totals; row items are campaigns.

campaign_group_id.description: Parent campaign group ID (folder), not an ad set.

get.summary: List LinkedIn campaign groups for one ad account
get.description: Lists campaign group names/IDs. Uses adAnalytics when LinkedIn adCampaignGroups FINDER is unavailable. If empty, call linkedinCampaignGroupsPerformance for spend by group.

get.summary: LinkedIn Ads performance by campaign group
get.description: Campaign group (folder above campaigns). Not Meta ad set and not LinkedIn campaign. Do not merge with linkedinPerformance rows — groups and campaigns are different levels.

get.summary: LinkedIn Ads performance by creative (ad)
get.description: Sub-campaign level (creative/ad). LinkedIn has no ad set — use this instead of Meta ad-set logic. Do not roll creative rows into campaign dashboards; filter by campaign_id when needed.

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Optional LinkedIn campaign ID to limit creatives to one campaign

get.summary: LinkedIn ad creative video/image URLs with thumbnails
get.description: Returns thumbnail_url and video_url for LinkedIn ad creatives. Resolves video assets via LinkedIn Videos API. Set videos_only=false to include static image creatives.

parameters.name: videos_only
parameters.description: When true (default), return video creatives only.

thumbnail_url.description: LinkedIn video thumbnail URL when available.

post.summary: Sync LinkedIn daily metrics to Postgres (metrics_daily)
post.description: Pulls day-by-day spend/clicks/impressions from LinkedIn and upserts into metrics_daily. Use LAST_180_DAYS for max history in one call. Requires Railway DATABASE_URL.

get.summary: Meta credential status (no secrets)
Verify Meta access token and Business Manager access
Check ads_read on one Meta ad account (required for metaVideos)
get.description: metaPerformance uses read_insights; metaVideos needs ads_read on the specific ad account. Call this before metaVideos if creatives fail with permission errors.

get.summary: List Meta ad accounts in Business Manager
get.description: Returns owned and client ad accounts from META_BUSINESS_ID. Use account id when calling metaPerformance or metaWarehouseSync.

get.summary: Meta Ads performance by campaign (one account)
get.description: Campaign-level metrics only. Each row has entity_level=campaign. For ad sets use metaAdsetsPerformance. Always key rows by id, never by name.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Meta ad account ID (digits only, from metaAccounts)

get.summary: Meta Ads performance by ad set
get.description: Ad set-level metrics (sub-campaign). Do not roll ad set rows into campaign dashboards; filter by campaign_id when needed.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Meta ad account ID (digits only, from metaAccounts)

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Optional Meta campaign ID to limit ad sets to one campaign

get.summary: Meta ad video/image URLs with thumbnails
get.description: Returns thumbnail_url and video_url from Meta ad creatives. Requires ads_read on the ad account (not just read_insights). If metaPerformance works but this fails, call metaTestAdsAccess first. Set videos_only=false to include static image ads.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Meta ad account ID (digits only, from metaAccounts)

parameters.name: videos_only
parameters.description: When true (default), return video ads only.

thumbnail_url.description: Meta creative or video thumbnail URL.

post.summary: Sync Meta daily metrics to Postgres (metrics_daily)
post.description: Pulls day-by-day spend/clicks/impressions from Meta and upserts into metrics_daily with source=meta. Requires Railway DATABASE_URL.

get.summary: Postgres warehouse status (metrics_daily row counts)
Read stored daily metrics from Postgres
GA4 BigQuery env status (project, dataset, credential parse check)
get.description: Call before ga4Query to get bq_project_id and bq_dataset_id for SQL table names. No secrets returned.

post.summary: Run BigQuery SQL on GA4 export
post.description: Query GA4 export tables, e.g. `{bq_project_id}.{bq_dataset_id}.events_*`. Call ga4Env first for project/dataset IDs.
